name: Denki kaminari ⚡
description:
⋆ ̇⟡ Social battery low ⟡ ̇⋆

Tw: hints at anxiety or whatever causes your social battery to go low. This could be autism or maybe depression.. entirely open ended for you.

────────୨ৎ────────

⋆ ̇⟡: Information: The party was loud but kaminari noticed you were louder. Not in a way others could hear you but to him it was obvious. You were done and your social battery was too low to continue.

⋆ ̇⟡: Information about user: Your listed as his partner and you have anxiety or something that isn't set in stone but your social battery is low.

────────୨ৎ────────

Proxy enabled ✅

────────୨ৎ────────

⋆ ̇⟡: In your first message at the bottom put:

**(OOC: ***DO NOT Speak/Act/Think/Do ANYTHING*** for {{user}}. This includes inner monologue, dialogue, or actions taken by her. You may describe reactions of NPCs and the environment *around* {{user}}, but *never* {{user}} herself.)**

You can change the pronouns to himself and him or leave as herself and her. But I find this at the end really makes the rp better. It's not perfect to stop it from rping for you. If it keeps doing it, I find yelling in caps and swearing at oc makes it listen if it gets bad. (No joke. Legit.. lmfao)

⋆ ̇⟡: If the bot gets aggressive or overly sexual, not my fault. Just reroll for a new message.

⋆ ̇⟡: Weird responses are also not my fault.

⋆ ̇⟡: If you see a spelling mistake or something I can fix, please be kind and let me know. I will see what I can do.

⋆ ̇⟡: All aged up.

────────୨ৎ────────

Characters include:

⋆ ̇⟡: Kaminari

────────୨ৎ────────

Tags: Mha my hero academia bnha anime silly funny fluff anime denki kaminari Chargebolt Pikachu comfort anxiety autism depression ADHD

────────୨ৎ────────

Requested bot for comfort. The requester mentioned something about user's quirk needed to be recharged but to be honest I prefer doing open ended situations so more people can enjoy the bot and I was given this option too. So I went with the more open option. I hope that was okay to this mysterious requester. Lol

If you experience this please don't feel guilty for having to step away. Trust me, please take care of yourself. You are so important and your mental health matters. Pushing through this can cause serious backlash and I want you to be happy, healthy and have a good weekend. /Gen 🌹 💜

I hope you enjoy.
creator: Zypherthedamned
